mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(x.ngay, '%d/%m') AS nhan, SUM(CASE WHEN x.gia_tri > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS so_luong, COALESCE(SUM(x.gia_tri), 0) AS gia_tri FROM ( SELECT DATE(v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan) AS ngay, v.so_tien_thanh_toan AS gia_tri FROM ve_xe v WHERE v.trang_thai IN ('PAID', 'REFUND_PENDING') AND v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan IS NOT NULL AND v.thoi_gian_thanh_toan >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{soNgay} - 1 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(v.thoi_gian_hoan) AS ngay, -v.so_tien_hoan AS gia_tri FROM ve_xe v WHERE v.trang_thai = 'REFUNDED' AND v.thoi_gian_hoan IS NOT NULL AND v.so_tien_hoan IS NOT NULL AND v.thoi_gian_hoan >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{soNgay} - 1 DAY) ) x GROUP BY x.ngay ORDER BY x.ngay ASC
SELECT v.trang_thai AS nhan, COUNT(*) AS so_luong, 0 AS gia_tri FROM ve_xe v GROUP BY v.trang_thai ORDER BY so_luong DESC

SELECT COALESCE(h.ten, h.ma_loai, 'Khác') AS nhan, COUNT(*) AS so_luong, COALESCE(SUM(v.so_tien_thanh_toan), 0) AS gia_tri FROM ve_xe v LEFT JOIN hinh_thuc_thanh_toan h ON v.ma_hinh_thuc = h.ma WHERE v.trang_thai IN ('PAID', 'REFUND_PENDING') GROUP BY COALESCE(h.ten, h.ma_loai, 'Khác') ORDER BY so_luong DESC

SELECT CONCAT(t.diem_di, ' → ', t.diem_den) AS nhan, COUNT(v.ma) AS so_luong, COALESCE(SUM(v.so_tien_thanh_toan), 0) AS gia_tri FROM ve_xe v INNER JOIN chuyen_xe cx ON v.ma_chuyen = cx.ma INNER JOIN tuyen_duong t ON cx.ma_tuyen = t.ma WHERE v.trang_thai IN ('PAID', 'REFUND_PENDING') GROUP BY t.ma, t.diem_di, t.diem_den, CONCAT(t.diem_di, ' → ', t.diem_den) ORDER BY so_luong DESC LIMIT #{gioiHan}
SELECT CONCAT(d.diem_so, ' sao') AS nhan, COUNT(*) AS so_luong, d.diem_so AS gia_tri FROM danh_gia_chuyen d GROUP BY d.diem_so, CONCAT(d.diem_so, ' sao') ORDER BY d.diem_so ASC
